evals.name: team-update
evals.prompt: Make me a 5-slide team update on our Q4 website redesign — standup tomorrow, super informal, just the highlights of what shipped.

evals.name: auth-migration
evals.prompt: I need to give a 20-minute talk at our engineering all-hands about the auth migration we just finished. Audience is ~40 engineers, mixed seniority. I want to cover what we shipped, the gnarliest bug we hit, and what we'd do differently. PPTX please. I have some notes in this directory.

evals.name: pitch-deck
evals.prompt: Put together a pitch deck for a 15-minute investor meeting about our new consumer fitness app — pre-revenue, seed stage, looking for $2M. Standard 10-12 slide structure, VC audience. I've dropped what I have into this directory.

evals.name: otel-resume
evals.prompt: Hey, continue working on my OTel migration deck.
